text:
Congratulations! This is genuinely great news and I'm so happy for you.

You worked hard for this. All those applications, interviews, and moments of doubt — they led right here. You earned it.

I know this role means a lot to you, and watching you pursue it has been something to see. You stayed focused when it would have been easy to give up. That says a lot about who you are.

Now go enjoy this moment before the real work starts. Celebrate tonight, sleep well, and show up ready. They are lucky to have you, and you are going to do great things there.

So proud of you.
